summary: Made one surgical exit-continuity edit so chapter 12 now directly seeds the folded three-name note in Inez's hand that Silas carries into chapter 13. The opening was left intact because its temporal kitchen-entry scaffold already differs from the visible adjacent waterfront opening.
edits: Added a final beat showing Inez copying three released names and their uses onto a smaller scrap for morning.
Kept the opening unchanged because it does not mirror the visible adjacent chapter-opening structure.
